effects.description: Gain the effect of the Haste spell for 1 minute (no concentration required). Grants +2 AC, advantage on DEX saves, additional action each turn (Attack one weapon attack only, Dash, Disengage, Hide, Use an Object), doubled speed.

notes: No concentration required unlike the spell. When effect ends, creature cannot move or take actions until after its next turn (lethargy).

effects.description: Under the effect of Bless spell (no concentration required). Add 1d4 to attack rolls and saving throws for 1 hour.

notes: Grants 10 temp HP and Bless effect (1d4 to attacks and saves) for 1 hour, no concentration.

effects.description: Resistance to all damage for 1 minute.
Gain a flying speed equal to walking speed and can hover for 1 hour. Fall if airborne when effect ends.
Become invisible for 1 hour. Equipment carried is also invisible. Ends early if you attack or cast a spell.

notes: Effect ends early if the creature attacks or casts a spell.

effects.description: Exhale fire at a target within 30 feet (bonus action to use). Three uses or 1 hour, whichever comes first.

notes: After drinking (action), uses bonus action to exhale fire. Grants 3 uses within 1 hour.

effects.description: Gain the Enlarge effect of Enlarge/Reduce for 1d4 hours (no concentration). Advantage on STR checks and saves, +1d4 to weapon damage.

notes: No concentration required.

effects.description: Gain the Reduce effect of Enlarge/Reduce for 1d4 hours (no concentration). Disadvantage on STR checks and saves, -1d4 from weapon damage.

notes: No concentration required. Could be used offensively if administered to an unwilling creature.

effects.description: Take 3d6 poison damage immediately.
DC 13 CON save or become poisoned. While poisoned, take 3d6 poison damage at start of each turn. Save at end of each turn; success reduces damage by 1d6. Poison ends when damage reaches 0.

notes: Disguised as a healing potion. Complex damage reduction mechanic each turn.

effects.description: First damage-dealing spell of 4th level or lower cast within 1 minute uses maximum dice values instead of rolling.

notes: Applies to the first damage-dealing spell of 4th level or lower within 1 minute.

effects.description: Gain advantage on one ability check, attack roll, or saving throw of your choice within the next hour.

notes: Player chooses when to apply the advantage within the 1-hour window.

effects.description: Removes all exhaustion, cures all diseases and poisons. For 24 hours, regain maximum HP for any Hit Die spent.

notes: Primarily used out of combat for Hit Die recovery. Exhaustion removal is combat-relevant.

effects.description: Gain the effect of Gaseous Form for 1 hour (no concentration). Transform into a misty cloud. Fly speed 10 ft, resistance to nonmagical damage, advantage on STR/DEX/CON saves, can pass through small holes. Cannot attack or cast spells.

notes: Can end effect early as a bonus action. No concentration required.

effects.description: Resistance to acid damage for 1 hour.
Resistance to cold damage for 1 hour.
Resistance to fire damage for 1 hour.
Resistance to force damage for 1 hour.
Resistance to lightning damage for 1 hour.
Resistance to necrotic damage for 1 hour.
Resistance to poison damage for 1 hour.
Resistance to psychic damage for 1 hour.
Resistance to radiant damage for 1 hour.
Resistance to thunder damage for 1 hour.
Strength score becomes 21 for 1 hour. No effect if Strength is already 21 or higher.
Strength score becomes 23 for 1 hour. No effect if Strength is already 23 or higher.

notes: Same Strength value as Potion of Stone Giant Strength.

effects.description: Strength score becomes 23 for 1 hour. No effect if Strength is already 23 or higher.

notes: Same Strength value as Potion of Frost Giant Strength.

effects.description: Strength score becomes 25 for 1 hour. No effect if Strength is already 25 or higher.
Strength score becomes 27 for 1 hour. No effect if Strength is already 27 or higher.
Strength score becomes 29 for 1 hour. No effect if Strength is already 29 or higher.
Cures any disease. Removes blinded, deafened, paralyzed, and poisoned conditions.

notes: Does not restore HP; removes conditions and diseases only.

effects.description: Coated weapon or up to 5 pieces of ammunition gain +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls for 1 hour. Takes 1 minute to apply.

notes: Requires 1 minute to apply. Only works on slashing or piercing weapons/ammunition.

effects.description: Gain the effect of Etherealness spell for 1 hour. Enter the Ethereal Plane. Takes 10 minutes to apply.

notes: Takes 10 minutes to apply, so cannot be used during combat. Included because the effect is combat-relevant if pre-applied. REVIEW: borderline inclusion.

attunementRequirement: by a spellcaster
notes: 1 charge = 3rd-level Fireball (8d6). Each additional charge increases spell level by 1 (+1d6 damage per charge). Risk of destruction on d20 roll of 1 when last charge expended.

effects.description: 3 darts at 1st level, each dealing 1d4+1 force damage. Each additional charge adds 1 dart.

notes: 1 charge = 1st-level Magic Missile (3 darts). Each additional charge adds 1 dart. Each dart can target a different creature.

attunementRequirement: by a spellcaster
notes: 1 charge = 3rd-level Lightning Bolt (8d6). Each additional charge increases spell level by 1 (+1d6 damage per charge). 100-foot line, 5 feet wide.

attunementRequirement: by a spellcaster

effects.description: Casts Web spell. Creatures in area must save or be restrained. Can repeat save each turn.

notes: Requires concentration equivalent tracking. Web fills 20-foot cube, difficult terrain, creatures entering or starting turn must save vs restrained.

attunementRequirement: by a spellcaster

effects.description: Casts Hold Person (2 charges) or Hold Monster (5 charges). Target paralyzed, save each turn.
Can use reaction to expend 1 charge for advantage on saves vs paralysis or restraint, or advantage on checks to escape grapple.

notes: Hold Person costs 2 charges, Hold Monster costs 5 charges. Both use DC 17 WIS save. Also has defensive reaction use (1 charge).

effects.description: Expend 1 charge: Command (flee or grovel), DC 15 WIS save.
Expend 2 charges: 60-foot cone, DC 15 WIS save or frightened for 1 minute. Must spend turns moving away. Repeat save each turn.

notes: Two modes: Command (1 charge, single target) and Cone of Fear (2 charges, 60-foot cone).

attunementRequirement: by a spellcaster

effects.description: Blue ray, DC 15 CON save or paralyzed for 1 minute. Target can repeat save at end of each turn.

attunementRequirement: by a spellcaster

effects.description: Casts Polymorph. DC 15 WIS save or target transforms into a beast form.

notes: Polymorph is inherently complex. DM must select beast form, track new HP pool, and handle reversion.

attunementRequirement: by a spellcaster

effects.description: Casts Entangle. 20-foot square of grasping weeds. STR save or restrained. Can repeat save each turn.

notes: Lower DC (13) than most wands. Area becomes difficult terrain.

attunementRequirement: by a spellcaster

effects.description: Roll d100 and consult table for random effect. Possible effects include: Slow, Faerie Fire, Gust of Wind, Detect Thoughts, Stinking Cloud, Lightning Bolt (5d6), Enlarge/Reduce, Darkness, grass growth, gem rain, Fireball (5d6), invisibility, leaves growth, geyser, and many more.

notes: Completely random effects via d100 table. Cannot be automated. DC 15 for any spells with saves.

attunementRequirement: by a druid, sorcerer, warlock, or wizard

effects.description: Resistance to fire damage while holding staff.
Burning Hands (1 charge)
Fireball (3 charges)
Wall of Fire (4 charges). Creates wall of fire, uses caster's spell save DC.

notes: Uses wielder's spell save DC. Also provides passive fire resistance.

attunementRequirement: by a druid, sorcerer, warlock, or wizard

effects.description: Resistance to cold damage while holding staff.
Fog Cloud (1 charge). Creates heavily obscured fog sphere.
Ice Storm (4 charges). 2d8 bludgeoning + 4d6 cold.
Cone of Cold (5 charges). 8d8 cold damage, 60-foot cone.
Wall of Ice (4 charges). Creates wall of ice, uses caster's spell save DC.

notes: Uses wielder's spell save DC. Also provides passive cold resistance.

attunementRequirement: by a bard, cleric, or druid

effects.description: Cure Wounds (1 charge per spell level, up to 4th). Uses caster's spellcasting ability modifier.
Lesser Restoration (2 charges). Removes one disease or condition: blinded, deafened, paralyzed, or poisoned.
Mass Cure Wounds (5 charges). Heal up to 6 creatures within 30 feet of a point within 60 feet.

notes: Uses wielder's spellcasting ability modifier and spell save DC.

effects.description: On melee hit, expend up to 3 charges for 1d6 force damage per charge. Also functions as +3 magic quarterstaff.

notes: Triggered on melee hit (not a separate action). +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls as a magic quarterstaff.

attunementRequirement: by a sorcerer, warlock, or wizard

effects.description: +2 bonus to AC, saving throws, and spell attack rolls while holding.
Power Strike: On melee hit, expend 1 charge for extra 1d6 force damage.
Cone of Cold (5 charges)
Fireball at 5th level (5 charges)
Lightning Bolt at 5th level (5 charges)
Magic Missile (1 charge)
Ray of Enfeeblement (1 charge)
Globe of Invulnerability (6 charges)
Hold Monster (5 charges)
Wall of Force (5 charges)

Retributive Strike: Break the staff as an action. Releases remaining magic as 30-foot sphere explosion. 16 x remaining charges force damage, DEX save for half (DC = 2 x remaining charges, minimum 17). 50% chance to teleport to random plane instead of taking damage.

notes: +2 magic quarterstaff with many spell options. Uses wielder's spell save DC and spell attack bonus. Retributive Strike is a last-resort option that destroys the staff.

attunementRequirement: by a sorcerer, warlock, or wizard

effects.description: Advantage on saving throws against spells. +2 bonus to spell attack rolls. Can absorb spells targeting only you as reaction, gaining charges equal to spell level.
Fireball at 7th level (7 charges)
Lightning Bolt at 7th level (7 charges)
Conjure Elemental (7 charges)
Plane Shift (7 charges)
Telekinesis (5 charges)
Dispel Magic (3 charges)
Passwall (5 charges)
Ice Storm (4 charges)
Wall of Fire (4 charges)
Web (2 charges)
Flaming Sphere (2 charges)
Knock (2 charges)
Retributive Strike: Same as Staff of Power but with up to 50 charges of force damage potential.

notes: Legendary artifact. +2 magic quarterstaff. Also casts Arcane Lock, Detect Magic, Enlarge/Reduce, Light, Mage Hand, Protection from Evil and Good at no charge cost. Uses wielder's spell save DC. Spell Absorption as reaction. Retributive Strike option.

attunementRequirement: by a bard, cleric, druid, sorcerer, warlock, or wizard

effects.description: Giant Insect (4 charges). Transform insects into giant versions.
Insect Plague (5 charges). 20-foot sphere, 4d10 piercing damage, CON save for half.
Insect Cloud (1 charge). 30-foot radius swarm of harmless insects for 10 minutes. Heavily obscures area for all except user.

notes: Uses wielder's spell save DC. Giant Insect and Insect Plague are concentration spells. Insect Cloud is heavily obscuring.

effects.description: Lightning: On melee hit, deal extra 2d6 lightning damage. Once per dawn.
Thunder: On melee hit, DC 17 CON save or stunned until end of your next turn. Once per dawn.
Lightning Strike (action): 5-foot wide, 120-foot line. DC 17 DEX save, 9d6 lightning damage, half on save. Once per dawn.
Thunderclap (action): Each creature within 60 feet, DC 17 CON save or stunned until end of your next turn. Also 2d6 thunder damage on failed save. Once per dawn.
Thunder and Lightning (action): Use both Lightning Strike and Thunderclap simultaneously without expending their individual daily uses. Once per dawn.

notes: +2 magic quarterstaff. Five different abilities, each usable once per dawn. The combined Thunder and Lightning option does not expend the individual uses. REVIEW: complex tracking of five separate daily uses.

attunementRequirement: by a cleric, druid, or warlock

effects.description: On melee hit, expend 1 charge to deal extra 2d10 necrotic damage.
Target must succeed on DC 15 CON save or have disadvantage on STR and CON ability checks and saving throws for 1 hour.

notes: Triggered on melee hit (not a separate action). Functions as a magic quarterstaff.

attunementRequirement: by a cleric, druid, or warlock

effects.description: Transform staff into a giant constrictor snake under your control. Acts on its own initiative. Bonus action to revert. If snake dies, staff is destroyed. If reverted before death, regains all HP.

notes: Requires DM to run the giant constrictor snake stat block. Staff is destroyed if snake reaches 0 HP.

attunementRequirement: by a cleric, druid, or warlock

effects.description: Melee attack with snake head (reach 5 ft, proficiency bonus applies). On hit: 1d6 piercing damage plus DC 15 CON save or 3d6 poison damage.
Poison damage on failed CON save after hit.

notes: Bonus action to animate for 1 minute, bonus action to revert. Snake head has AC 15 and 20 HP; if destroyed, staff is destroyed. Melee attack uses proficiency bonus.

effects.description: +1 bonus to AC while holding.
Mage Armor (1 charge). AC becomes 13 + DEX modifier for 8 hours.
Shield (2 charges). +5 AC until start of next turn, including against triggering attack.

notes: Must be on class spell list to use. Shield is cast as a reaction. No material components needed.

effects.description: Cast the cantrip written on the scroll without material components. Must be on your class spell list. Save DC 13, attack bonus +5.

notes: The specific spell varies per scroll. System should prompt DM to specify which spell. Casting time equals the spell's normal casting time.

effects.description: Cast a 1st-level spell from the scroll without material components. Must be on your class spell list. DC 11 ability check if above your casting level. Save DC 13, attack bonus +5.

notes: The specific spell varies per scroll. If spell is above caster's level, DC 11 spellcasting ability check required.

effects.description: Cast a 2nd-level spell from the scroll without material components. Must be on your class spell list. DC 12 ability check if above your casting level. Save DC 13, attack bonus +5.

notes: The specific spell varies per scroll. If spell is above caster's level, DC 12 spellcasting ability check required.

effects.description: Cast a 3rd-level spell from the scroll without material components. Must be on your class spell list. DC 13 ability check if above your casting level. Save DC 15, attack bonus +7.

notes: The specific spell varies per scroll. If spell is above caster's level, DC 13 spellcasting ability check required. Higher save DC and attack bonus than lower-level scrolls.

effects.description: 5-foot radius, 10-foot high invisible barrier cylinder prevents aberrations from entering or affecting anything within for 5 minutes. Creature can force entry with DC 15 CHA check. Moves with you.

notes: 5-minute duration. Any creature type can force entry with a DC 15 Charisma check.

effects.description: 5-foot radius, 10-foot high invisible barrier cylinder prevents beasts from entering or affecting anything within for 5 minutes.

notes: 5-minute duration. Creature can force entry with DC 15 CHA check.

effects.description: 5-foot radius, 10-foot high invisible barrier cylinder prevents celestials from entering or affecting anything within for 5 minutes.

notes: 5-minute duration. Creature can force entry with DC 15 CHA check.

effects.description: 5-foot radius, 10-foot high invisible barrier cylinder prevents elementals from entering or affecting anything within for 5 minutes.

notes: 5-minute duration. Creature can force entry with DC 15 CHA check.

effects.description: 5-foot radius, 10-foot high invisible barrier cylinder prevents fey from entering or affecting anything within for 5 minutes.

notes: 5-minute duration. Creature can force entry with DC 15 CHA check.

effects.description: 5-foot radius, 10-foot high invisible barrier cylinder prevents fiends from entering or affecting anything within for 5 minutes.

notes: 5-minute duration. Creature can force entry with DC 15 CHA check.

effects.description: 5-foot radius, 10-foot high invisible barrier cylinder prevents plants from entering or affecting anything within for 5 minutes.

notes: 5-minute duration. Creature can force entry with DC 15 CHA check.

effects.description: 5-foot radius, 10-foot high invisible barrier cylinder prevents undead from entering or affecting anything within for 5 minutes.

notes: 5-minute duration. Creature can force entry with DC 15 CHA check.

effects.description: Detach a bead and throw up to 60 feet. Detonates as 3rd-level Fireball. Can throw multiple beads at once; each extra bead increases spell level by 1.

notes: Contains 1d6+3 beads when found. Each bead is consumed. Throwing multiple beads in one action upcasts the Fireball (+1 level per extra bead, +1d6 damage per level).

effects.description: When hurled with command word, transforms into 5-foot wide, 120-foot line of lightning. Creatures in line (except you and target): DC 13 DEX save, 4d6 lightning damage, half on save. Target takes normal javelin damage plus 4d6 lightning damage.

notes: Property usable once per dawn. Can still be used as a magic javelin between uses. Target also takes normal javelin attack damage (1d6+STR piercing).

effects.description: 30-foot cone, DC 15 CON save, 5d6 thunder damage (half on save). Creatures deafened for 1 minute on failed save. Glass/crystal objects take 10d6 thunder damage.
Deafened for 1 minute on failed save.

notes: 20% chance of exploding on each use (10d6 fire damage to blower, horn destroyed). No limit on uses otherwise.

effects.description: Throw up to 60 feet. 10-foot radius explosion, DC 15 DEX save, 5d4 force damage (half on save). A sphere of transparent force encloses the area for 1 minute.
After explosion, a sphere of force (as Otiluke's Resilient Sphere) encloses the area for 1 minute. Only breathable air can pass through. Enclosed creature can push sphere at half speed.

notes: Typically found in groups of 1d4+4. The force sphere enclosure is complex to track. REVIEW: sphere interaction needs manual DM management.

effects.description: Ranged attack (DEX mod + proficiency). On hit, target is restrained until released (bonus action). DC 20 STR check to break free (if failed, no further attempts). Huge or smaller creatures only.

notes: Usable once per dawn. Item destroyed if STR check succeeds. If STR check fails, no further attempts possible by that creature.

effects.description: You and each creature and object within 10 feet become invisible for 2d4 minutes. Attacking or casting a spell ends the effect for that creature only.

notes: Affects all creatures within 10 feet, not just the user. Each creature's invisibility ends independently if they attack or cast a spell.

effects.description: Each breathing creature within 30 feet: DC 15 CON save or incapacitated and suffocating. Can repeat save each turn. On 3 consecutive failed saves, takes 2d10 bludgeoning damage per failed save.

notes: Appears to be Dust of Disappearance. Suffocation mechanic is complex: creature suffocates until it succeeds on a save. If it fails 3 saves in a row, it takes 2d10 bludgeoning damage per failed save thereafter.

effects.description: Cast Dimension Door. Teleport up to 500 feet to a location you can visualize. Can bring one willing creature of your size or smaller. Smoke clouds at departure and arrival points (lightly obscured, dissipate at end of next turn).

notes: Usable once per dawn. Leaves smoke clouds that lightly obscure. Combat-relevant for tactical repositioning.

effects.description: Expend 1 to 3 charges. Ranged spell attack. On hit, deals 2d10 force damage per charge expended. Can also push the target 5 feet per charge.

notes: Can also be used to break unattended objects (STR check with +5 per charge). 1-3 charges per use, damage and push scale linearly.

attunementRequirement: by a spellcaster

effects.description: Regain one expended spell slot of 3rd level or lower. If the expended slot was 4th level or higher, the new slot is 3rd level.

notes: Usable once per dawn. Does not need to be used during combat but is combat-relevant for spell slot recovery.

effects.description: Use action to coat blade with poison (1 minute or until hit). On hit: DC 15 CON save or 2d10 poison damage and poisoned for 1 minute.
Poisoned for 1 minute on failed CON save.

notes: +1 magic weapon. Poison coating is activated as an action (separate from the attack), usable once per dawn. Poison lasts 1 minute or until next hit.

effects.description: Expend 1 charge. Each creature of your choice within 30 feet: DC 15 WIS save or frightened for 1 minute. Must spend turns moving away. Repeat save at end of each turn if no line of sight to you.

notes: Also functions as a magic mace for melee attacks.

effects.description: Play pipes and expend 1 charge. Each creature within 30 feet that hears: DC 15 WIS save or frightened for 1 minute. Can repeat save at end of each turn. Success grants immunity for 24 hours.

notes: Requires proficiency with wind instruments. Creatures that succeed on save are immune for 24 hours.

effects.description: When a creature you can see within 60 feet damages you, use reaction and expend 1 charge. Target: DC 13 DEX save, 2d10 lightning damage (half on save).

notes: Reaction-based, triggered when you take damage. All charges regain at dawn.

effects.description: Exhale: gain the effect of Gust of Wind spell (60-foot line of strong wind, creatures in line must save or be pushed). OR Hold: don't need to breathe for 1 hour.

notes: Two mutually exclusive modes on use. If exhaled, casts Gust of Wind. If held, 1 hour of no breathing needed. Player must choose at time of use.

effects.description: While wearing: resistance to fire damage. Undead within 30 feet have disadvantage on attack rolls against you. Dim light in 30-foot radius (sunlight). Can use action to activate gems for various effects.
Remove 1 fire opal: Cast Fireball (DC 18). Limited by number of fire opals remaining (3d10 when found).
Remove 1 diamond: Cast Prismatic Spray (DC 18). Limited by number of diamonds remaining (1d10 when found).
Remove 1 opal: Cast Daylight. Limited by number of opals remaining (4d10 when found).
Remove 1 ruby: Cast Wall of Fire (DC 18). Limited by number of rubies remaining (2d10 when found).

notes: Gem counts determined randomly when found. Risk: on d20 roll of 1 when taking fire damage from failed spell save, remaining gems explode (various damage per gem type within 60 feet, DEX DC 17 for half). Loses magic when all gems removed.

effects.description: Three command words: (1) shed bright light 30 ft + dim 30 ft, no charge; (2) fire brilliant beam at creature within 60 ft, DC 15 CON save or blinded for 1 minute (1 charge); (3) flare of light 30 ft cone, each creature DC 15 CON save or blinded for 1 minute (5 charges).

notes: 50 charges total, non-recharging. Becomes a nonmagical jewel (50 gp) when charges exhausted. The blinding beam (1 charge) and flare (5 charges) are the combat-relevant modes.

effects.description: Pull fuzzy object and throw up to 20 feet. Transforms into a random creature (d8: weasel, giant rat, badger, boar, panther, giant badger, dire wolf, giant elk). Creature is friendly, acts on your turn, commanded with bonus action. Vanishes at dawn or 0 HP. Three uses per dawn.

notes: Random creature from table. DM must run creature stat block. Three pulls per dawn.

effects.description: Pull fuzzy object and throw up to 20 feet. Transforms into a random creature (d8: rat, owl, mastiff, goat, giant goat, giant boar, lion, giant elk). Creature is friendly, acts on your turn, commanded with bonus action. Vanishes at dawn or 0 HP. Three uses per dawn.

notes: Random creature from table. DM must run creature stat block. Three pulls per dawn.

effects.description: Pull fuzzy object and throw up to 20 feet. Transforms into a random creature (d8: jackal, ape, baboon, axe beak, black bear, giant weasel, giant hyena, tiger). Creature is friendly, acts on your turn, commanded with bonus action. Vanishes at dawn or 0 HP. Three uses per dawn.

notes: Random creature from table. DM must run creature stat block. Three pulls per dawn.

effects.description: Break the gem to summon an air elemental, as if casting Conjure Elemental. Gem's magic is lost.

notes: DM must run elemental stat block. Elemental obeys commands but may become hostile if concentration-like control is lost.

effects.description: Break the gem to summon a water elemental, as if casting Conjure Elemental. Gem's magic is lost.

notes: DM must run elemental stat block.

effects.description: Break the gem to summon a fire elemental, as if casting Conjure Elemental. Gem's magic is lost.

notes: DM must run elemental stat block.

effects.description: Break the gem to summon an earth elemental, as if casting Conjure Elemental. Gem's magic is lost.

notes: DM must run elemental stat block.

effects.description: Blow horn to summon 2d4+2 berserker warrior spirits within 60 feet. Friendly and follow commands. Last 1 hour or until 0 HP.

notes: No proficiency requirement for silver horn. Usable once per 7 days. DM must run berserker stat blocks.

effects.description: Blow horn to summon 3d4+3 berserker warrior spirits within 60 feet. Friendly and follow commands. Last 1 hour or until 0 HP.

notes: Requires proficiency with all simple weapons. If used without meeting requirement, summoned berserkers attack you. Usable once per 7 days.

effects.description: Blow horn to summon 4d4+4 berserker warrior spirits within 60 feet. Friendly and follow commands. Last 1 hour or until 0 HP.

notes: Requires proficiency with medium armor. If used without meeting requirement, summoned berserkers attack you. Usable once per 7 days.

effects.description: Blow horn to summon 5d4+5 berserker warrior spirits within 60 feet. Friendly and follow commands. Last 1 hour or until 0 HP.

notes: Requires proficiency with all martial weapons. If used without meeting requirement, summoned berserkers attack you. Usable once per 7 days.

attunementRequirement: by a cleric or paladin

effects.description: Extra 1d8 radiant damage on hit with this magic flail (passive, always active).
Bonus action to create incense cloud (10-foot radius) for 1 minute. At start of each of your turns, you and creatures in the incense regain 1d4 HP.

notes: Magic flail. Also counts as a holy symbol. Healing aura is once per dawn.

effects.description: Ray of Frost (no charges). Can spend 1 charge to cast at 5th level (2d8 cold damage). Attack bonus +5.
Sleet Storm (3 charges). DC 15. Heavily obscured area, difficult terrain, concentration checks, prone on failed DEX save.
Ice Storm (4 charges). DC 15. 2d8 bludgeoning + 4d6 cold damage in 20-foot radius.

notes: Unusual: destroyed on d20 roll of 20 (not 1) when last charge expended. Can cast Ray of Frost without charges. No components required for any spell.

attunementRequirement: by a bard, cleric, druid, sorcerer, warlock, or wizard

effects.description: Charm Person (1 charge)
Command (1 charge)
If you fail a save vs enchantment targeting only you, turn it into a success (once per dawn). If you succeed on such a save, can use reaction + 1 charge to turn the spell back on its caster.

notes: Uses wielder's spell save DC. Also casts Comprehend Languages (1 charge, non-combat). Also functions as a magic quarterstaff. Spell reflection is a powerful defensive feature.

effects.description: Become Huge for 24 hours (if Medium or smaller). Strength becomes 25 (if not already higher). HP maximum doubled (current HP doubled). Melee attack reach increases by 5 feet. Weapon damage dice tripled.

notes: Legendary rarity. HP doubling and weapon dice tripling are complex to track. When effect ends, HP above normal maximum become temp HP. REVIEW: significant stat modifications require careful tracking.

effects.description: Gain 2 Fragments of Possibility (last 8 hours). When making an attack, ability check, or saving throw, expend a fragment to roll an additional d20 and choose which to use. Can also expend when attacked to roll d20 and choose between yours and attacker's roll.

notes: Similar to Lucky feat. Two uses over 8 hours. Cannot gain additional Fragments while you have any from this potion.

effects.description: Resistance to fire and lightning damage while attuned.
Cast Thunderwave as 4th level (DC 16, 5d8 thunder damage) without expending a spell slot. No limit on uses.

notes: Can be used as arcane focus. Unlimited uses of 4th-level Thunderwave. Also pushes creatures 10 feet on failed save.
